2604.09757.title: MedLVR: Latent Visual Reasoning for Reliable Medical Visual Question Answering
2604.09757.paper_summary: Medical vision--language models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for medical visual question answering (VQA), yet their reasoning remains largely text-centric: images are encoded once as static context, and subsequent inference is dominated by language. This paradigm is fundamentally limited in clinical scenarios, where accurate answers often depend on subtle, localized visual evidence that cannot be reliably preserved in static embeddings. We propose \textsc{MedLVR}, a latent visual reasoning framework that introduces an explicit visual evidence state into autoregressive decoding. Instead of relying solely on text-based intermediate reasoning, \textsc{MedLVR} interleaves a short latent reasoning segment within the decoder by reusing hidden states as continuous latent steps, enabling iterative preservation and refinement of query-relevant visual evidence before answer generation. To support effective visual supervision, we adopt a two-stage training strategy: region of interest (ROI)-supervised fine-tuning aligns latent states with clinically relevant image evidence, and Visual-Latent Policy Optimization (VLPO) further optimizes latent reasoning and answer generation under outcome-level rewards. Experiments on OmniMedVQA and five external medical VQA benchmarks show that \textsc{MedLVR} consistently outperforms recent reasoning baselines and improves the average score over the Qwen2.5-VL-7B backbone from 48.3\% to 53.4\%. These results show that latent visual reasoning provides an effective mechanism for preserving diagnostically relevant visual evidence and improving the reliability of medical VQA.
2604.09757.paper_summary_zh: 醫療視覺-語言模型（VLMs）在醫療視覺問題回答（VQA）中顯示出強大的潛力，但它們的推理仍然主要以文本為中心：圖像被一次性編碼為靜態上下文，隨後的推理則以語言為主導。這種範式在臨床場景中基本上是有限的，因為準確的答案往往依賴於微妙的、局部的視覺證據，而這些證據無法在靜態嵌入中可靠地保留。我們提出了\textsc{MedLVR}，一種潛在視覺推理框架，將明確的視覺證據狀態引入自回歸解碼中。\textsc{MedLVR}不僅依賴於基於文本的中間推理，而是在解碼器中交錯一段短的潛在推理片段，通過重用隱藏狀態作為連續的潛在步驟，使得在生成答案之前能夠迭代地保留和精煉與查詢相關的視覺證據。為了支持有效的視覺監督，我們採用兩階段的訓練策略：感興趣區域（ROI）監督的微調將潛在狀態與臨床相關的圖像證據對齊，而視覺-潛在策略優化（VLPO）進一步在結果層級獎勵下優化潛在推理和答案生成。在OmniMedVQA和五個外部醫療VQA基準上的實驗顯示，\textsc{MedLVR}始終超越最近的推理基線，並將Qwen2.5-VL-7B骨幹的平均分數從48.3\%提高到53.4\%。這些結果表明，潛在視覺推理提供了一種有效的機制來保留診斷相關的視覺證據並提高醫療VQA的可靠性。
2604.09757.author: Suyang Xi et.al.
2604.09757.authors: Suyang Xi, Songtao Hu, Yuxiang Lai, Wangyun Dan, Yaqi Liu, Shansong Wang, Xiaofeng Yang
